changelog:
# Changelog

## [1.2.1] - Secure Tokenless Auto-Updater

### Security
- Removed hardcoded GitHub access token from the app binary — eliminates a critical credential exposure vector that could be extracted from any compiled build.

### Changed
- Auto-update checks now read from a static JSON manifest on GitHub CDN (`raw.githubusercontent.com`) — no API rate limits, no authentication required.
- Update downloads now use direct public URLs from the Homebrew tap mirror instead of the private GitHub API.
- Official website now loads version info and download links from the same static CDN manifest — no Cloudflare Worker dependency.

## [1.2.0] - Architecture-Specific Releases & Public Cask Mirroring

### Changed
- Replaced SwiftUI `.easeInOut` and `.spring` animations with highly precise `.timingCurve(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1, duration: 0.3)` to match native macOS window physics.
- Removed hardcoded height bounds from internal SwiftUI `ZStack` container, enabling fluid and reactive content resizing.

### Fixed
- Completely fixed the "resizing from center" visual glitch when switching between compact and normal view modes.
- Fixed window stuttering and content jitter during resizing animations.

## [1.1.6] - Infrastructure Fix Release

### Added
- Official website launched at mimp.pingvi.link
- Live downloads
- Bugs

### Changed
- Website link in About view updated
- All internal URLs migrated

### Fixed
- Fixed update view crash/blank screen
- Live download counter
